items.name_en: New Release🆕Chane1 25s Spring/Summer
items.name_cn:
New Release🆕Chane1 25s Spring/Summer
Cross-handle Mini Kelly Pale Blue
Purchased from the counter for 31,800 RMB~
A viral classic🔥New version Mini Kelly cross-body
When Chanel's legendary aesthetics collide with exquisite craftsmanship,
this Cross-chain Handle Mini Kelly is born
The design is ingenious, offering an elegant handheld feel,
and can also be worn casually across the body to unlock diverse fashion looks~

Material: Impala "Three Sheep" small ball pattern
Size: 10*18*4.5 cm

items.name_en: Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
items.name_cn:
Full packaging, upgraded version with original factory leather
Full name: Classic Flap 1112 Large Ball, Grainy Ball Pattern
Size: 15.5*25.5*6.5cm
Leather: Original Haas Large Ball Caviar interior, imported lambskin
Hardware: 24K plated, all steel hardware
The classic CF has an irresistible charm, serving as a mobile label of elegance wherever you go. The pure white exudes an elegant and gentle goddess vibe, paired with a gold buckle for exquisite luxury. It is truly a must-have entry-level luxury item~

items.name_en: hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
items.name_cn:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm

specs.rawTitle:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm
